title: rubus dimorphus
intro: Rubus dimorphus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Tibetan raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus dimorphus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Rubus dimorphus is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
